issues.title: ChatCompletionMessage$Role  Serialization Failure When role is ""

comments.body: Hi @chansanya , Could you confirm which ChatModel API are you using with this? In general, Spring AI relies on the chat response message `role` to process the response correctly. More information can be helpful to understand when the `role` can be empty. Thanks
I am using step-1-8k，the  sample api document is https://platform.stepfun.com/docs/api-reference/chat/streaming.

I got a similar problem.

chat model: deepseek-chat reusing the OPEN API client

Enable `com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.DeserializationFeature#FAIL_ON_NUMBERS_FOR_ENUMS` may fix it,
but the `OBJECT_MAPPER` in `org.springframework.ai.model.ModelOptionsUtils`  could not be customized.

my error logs：


谢你的帮助和详细解答！这对我非常有帮助！ 

```java
@PostConstruct
    public void simpleModule() {
        ModelOptionsUtils.OBJECT_MAPPER.configure(DeserializationFeature.ACCEPT_EMPTY_STRING_AS_NULL_OBJECT, true);
    }
```
Ok, thanks for that, we will update the objectmapper to allow for this.

The definition of ObjectMapper is now, 

```
	public static final ObjectMapper OBJECT_MAPPER = JsonMapper.builder()
		.disable(DeserializationFeature.FAIL_ON_UNKNOWN_PROPERTIES)
		.disable(SerializationFeature.FAIL_ON_EMPTY_BEANS)
		.addModules(JacksonUtils.instantiateAvailableModules())
		.build()
		.configure(DeserializationFeature.ACCEPT_EMPTY_STRING_AS_NULL_OBJECT, true);
```

I added a utility method as well to pass in your own object mapper.
